answers.what_exactly_improved: CSS effect pressure in performance-mode reduced; average FPS improved vs Slice 1 after baseline; worst-run 1% low improved from 20.0 to 29.94.
answers.what_remained_below_acceptance: Conservative minimum 1% low across 3 runs is 29.94, below blocker minimum 35.0.
answers.truth_regression_route_api_css_js: No regression: HTTP 200, CSS loaded true, JS loaded true, API checks pass, failed requests 0, console errors 0 in all 3 runs.
answers.backend_server_html_v07_runner_changed: No backend/server/HTML/V0.7 runner logic files changed. Only CSS source, audit receipts, and task evidence artifacts changed.
answers.commands_chunked: Yes. Truth-check, document reads, patch, audit, packaging executed in bounded phases.
answers.temporary_scripts_tools_preserved: No repo script files were created. Inline parsing helpers were ephemeral; no preservable generated script artifact in repo.
answers.slice3_recommendation: Target JS frame-loop/DOM churn reduction and add deterministic multi-run stabilization check for 1% low.
answers.bounded_slice_efficiency: PARTIAL: bounded and auditable, but additional reruns were needed due metric volatility.
